ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare

benefit.en: Guaranteed monthly pension of rupees 3,000 after age 60 to small and marginal farmers; government matches farmer's monthly contribution.
benefit.hi: 60 वर्ष की आयु के बाद छोटे और सीमांत किसानों को 3,000 रुपये मासिक पेंशन

eligibility_rules_human: Small and marginal farmer (cultivable landholding up to 2 hectares) aged 18 to 40 with a savings bank account, monthly contribution scaled to entry age. Excludes professionals, income-tax payers, and beneficiaries of other contributory pension schemes.

offline_steps: Operator enrolls farmer on the maandhan portal
